CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Medical Examination Of Pltf; Req. For Monetary, Terminating, Issue And/Or Evidentiary Sanctions Against Pltf And Her Attorney Of Record
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David W. Tate, Esq. of Cholakian & Associates, Tel. 650.871.9544, for defendant and moving party;
H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. of the Law Office of Nelson Meeks, Tel. 415.989.9915, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The parties have stipulated that Plaintiff Carmen Souza shall attend a medical examination on August 1, 2014. Therefore, the tentative ruling is vacated and DEFENDANT LORI HAENA'S Motion To Compel Medical Examination Of Plaintiff; Request For Monetary, Terminating, Issue And/Or Evidentiary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Her Attorney Of Record is granted in part. No sanctions are issued. The Court modified and signed the proposed order submitted by the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricai Dowling.

H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. appeared for and with the Plaintiff(s) Nemezio Silvera Barros and Carmen Souza and with Spanish Interpreter Rudy Taylor.
Parties and Interpreter were sworn and driect examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Lori Jean Haena for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $270,000.00
Costs - $505.00
Total judgment in the amount of $270,505.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
